title: Prototype End-to-End DevOps and SPA Foundation for DataTools Pro v2
description:
Modernize the DataTools Pro product delivery pipeline by creating a SPA proof-of-concept and establishing a foundation that will be migrated to the v2 codebase. The repository includes knowledge, AI skills, and a refined development process.

### SPA Setup
- Vite + React 19 + TypeScript scaffolded in the `spa/` folder
- React DOM, Vite 7, ESLint configured
- `.env.example` with API URL, app name, and feature flags
- Title set to "DataTools Pro"

### Repository
- GitHub: DataToolsPro/DTP_SPA_POC
- Branches: `create-react-app` for initial setup, `foundation-of-app` for enhancements

### Objective
Build the fastest software delivery flywheel between senior full-stack engineer and product leader.
acceptance_criteria: SPA POC scaffolded with Vite + React + TypeScript
Repository includes AI skills and process documentation
Foundation ready to be migrated into v2 codebase
ux_changes: New SPA frontend using React 19, TypeScript, and Vite as the build tool.
implementation_notes: The SPA is intentionally frontend/process only in this POC repo. Laravel backend is in a separate v2 repo. Frontend technical stack decisions are tracked in MBT-1338.
comment_summary: Developer cloned the repo, confirmed it's frontend/process only (no Laravel), and scaffolded the Vite + React + TypeScript project in the spa/ folder. Dev server is running and ready for further development.
